questions.question: A shirt originally costs $40. It is on sale for 25% off. What is the sale price?
Last year, a town had 500 residents. This year, it has 600 residents. What is the percent increase in population?
A restaurant bill is $80. You want to leave a 15% tip. How much is the tip?
A jacket costs $60 and is discounted by 10%. After the discount, what percent of the original price do you pay?
questions.explanation: If the discount is 10%, you pay 100% − 10% = 90% of the original price.

questions.question: A price increases from $20 to $24. What is the percent increase?
If 35% of a number is 70, what is the number?
